_comment: Static platform norms injected into brief jobs. Edit freely; not indexed.

instagram.notes: Reels 9:16 up to 90s; carousels up to 10 slides 4:5.

tiktok.notes: 9:16 video, 15-60s sweet spot; hook in first 1-2s.

x.notes: Lead with the hook; threads for depth.

linkedin.notes: Professional tone; first 2 lines show before 'see more'.

facebook.notes: Keep it short; link in first comment.
